scripts.audit:checkout-env: docker compose exec web sh -lc 'node -e "const keys=[\"MP_BILLING_ENABLED\",\"MP_ACCESS_TOKEN\",\"MP_PUBLIC_KEY\",\"MP_WEBHOOK_SECRET\",\"MP_BILLING_AMOUNT\",\"MP_BILLING_ANNUAL_AMOUNT\",\"MP_BILLING_ANNUAL_MAX_INSTALLMENTS\",\"NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL\"]; for (const key of keys) { const value = process.env[key]; const shown = value ? (key.includes(\"TOKEN\") || key.includes(\"SECRET\") ? \"present\" : value) : \"missing\"; console.log(key + \"=\" + shown); }"'
